programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel has an interview for a great job, but things do not go to plan. Monica competes to have a better relationship than Phoebe's.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel submits to peer pressure at work. Joey auditions against Ross's son. Monica and Phoebe plan a surprise birthday party for Rachel.

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Amazing Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles
programme.desc: Nick's Alaskan journey begins in Anchorage and takes him north to the USA's coldest city, taking in the mighty Matanuska Glacier on the way. (VS).

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups go on an adventure to have the best Halloween party ever - but one little Wingle isn't joining in. The Mixmups find a way to make the party fun for everyone. (VS).

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Miss Cookie organises a nature trail for Lucy and her class, but it goes right through the Little Kingdom! (VS).

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George, Peppa and Mummy Pig go to Miss Rabbit's shop to buy some brand new clothes for George.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy Pig visit Madame Gazelle, they realise that a tall tree next to her home is pushing it over.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups go on a Magical Biscuit Spoon Tree Adventure to pick some spoon biscuits. But they come across a rickety bridge. Can they find another way to get to it.

programme.title: Milkshake! Monkey
programme.desc: Preschool series starring an inquisitive puppet. Milkshake Monkey has been invited for his first sleepover, but will things at Rowan's house be the same as at his.

programme.title: Milo
programme.desc: Milo, Lofty and Lark take over Mila's work at the observatory. They worry that they have lost track of a special discovery, so must find a way to trace it in the vastness of space.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go!
programme.desc: When Nia suggests adding a song to spice up Sir Topham Hatt's new bench unveiling, he calls upon her to write a song for the ceremony.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Bronwen is staging a synchronised swimming spectacular to mark the reopening of the lido, when Norman accidentally starts a fire.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: Pip picks Zac to be in his team for the wheelbarrow race and Posy is upset. She overcompensates when playing with Jamila.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: Posy realises that Pip is afraid of the dark during a sleepover at his house, and the nightlight is broken.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig is taking Peppa and George for a day on his boat. They meet Mr Bull who is using his digger boat to remove all the rubbish in the river that shouldn't be there.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is playing at Suzy's house, and they find out that Granny Sheep is moving in! She transforms the dull spare room and attic into an exotic boudoir and creative studio.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Who's trying to steal Mr Curry's prized Giant Pumpkin? PC Wells and Paddington are on the case.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Farmer Yumi's new Yoga Goat class is a hit, until her goats go missing! The PAW Patrol must find the goats and return them safely to Yumi's farm.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The Turbots are trapped somewhere in the jungle. They tried to call the PAW Patrol, but their phone cut out.

programme.title: Animal Care Club
programme.desc: At Boston Park Farm, the cadets help spring-clean the chicken coop, set off on an egg-citing hunt for freshly laid eggs, and build a fun 'mountain' for the goats to climb and explore.

programme.title: The Creature Cases
programme.desc: A bird neighbourhood is rattled by a mysterious invader, who is pushing eggs out of nests, and replacing them with her own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Sharks are the toughest guys in town, but their next confrontation might be too much for SpongeBob to handle.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: Ocean-bound travelogue with presenter and singer Jane McDonald, featuring highlights of her cruise from Miami, around the Caribbean to Puerto Rico.

programme.title: Walking Wartime Britain
programme.desc: Arthur Williams starts his journey at St Paul's Cathedral, which became the iconic symbol of the Blitz, before learning how the blackout affected London's nightlife.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben revisits determined vet Janey, who set up a rescue centre for street dogs in Sri Lanka. He learns of her struggles and witnesses the impact her charity is having.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben meets a family undertaking an ambitious renovation of a dilapidated farmhouse in a Bulgarian village, and discovers how crucial this fresh start is for them.

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall meets Toy Poodle Ralph who, after being hit by a car, has fallen out with owner Karina. And noisy wire-haired Dachshund Tulah clucks like a chicken on every car trip.

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: A wayward Jack Russell is ruining the relationship between a little girl and her grandad. And Graeme Hall revisits a couple whose pair of puppy sisters have returned to warring ways.

programme.title: Catching Up with the Royals with Rev Richard Coles & Emily Andrews
programme.desc: Richard and Emily chat about royal 'secret weapons' and look back as William and Catherine celebrate their 15th wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: Fantasy adventure starring Robin Williams and Dustin Hoffman. A grown-up Peter Pan has to return to Neverland in order to rescue his children from the evil Captain Hook.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: Fantasy adventure starring Robin Williams and Dustin Hoffman. A grown-up Peter Pan has to return to Neverland in order to rescue his children from the evil Captain Hook.

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: Reuben Owen: Life in The Dales
programme.desc: Reuben takes on Miles as an apprentice. And although Reuben has never been on a plane before, Tommy helps his friend face his fear of heights - with an invitation to skydive.

programme.title: Reuben Owen: Life in The Dales
programme.desc: With winter approaching it's time for Reuben and his crew to learn new skills as they have never tarmacked before. Later they test the surface in their old three-wheeler Robin Reliant.

programme.title: William & Kate's Royal Wedding: A Day to Remember
programme.desc: This documentary takes a forensic look at the wedding of the decade: a future Queen, a global audience of two billion, and pure royal spectacle.

programme.title: The Royal Popularity List 2026
programme.desc: In this shocking documentary, we unveil the royal popularity list, as an exclusive and revealing poll divulges who captures the nation's hearts - and who really boils our blood.

programme.title: 1968: Those Were the Days
programme.desc: Archive highlights of the year the assassination of presidential hopeful Robert Kennedy stunned a disbelieving world, The Beatles dabbled in mysticism, and the musical Hair let it all hang out.

programme.title: Comedy Legends: Eric Sykes
programme.desc: Barry Cryer recalls some of the comic's funniest moments as explores Eric Sykes's journey from The Goon Show writer to TV star, to co-writer and performer with Hattie Jacques.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Jules Hudson and expert appraiser Kayleigh Davies are in Derbyshire, treasure-hunting with Mike and Jackie, who met while travelling in India.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Chris Kamara and expert appraiser Kayleigh Davies are in Birmingham, treasure hunting with Angela and Mike.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross's flirting technique fails to impress. Joey is in for a surprise when he tells everyone about his big television appearance.

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Amazing Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles
programme.desc: Nick travels from the extraordinary landscapes of Peru to Machu Picchu, visiting the world's fourth highest train station and Lake Titicaca. (VS).

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups go on a night-time adventure to try to stay awake longer than the moon, but they keep falling asleep. (VS).

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: When Holly's wand catches a cold, she is given a brand new WiseWand 3000 as a replacement. The only problem is, it doesn't do any magic at all! (VS).

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Daddy Pig receives a letter saying that he must go away on business, Peppa, Mummy and George go along too.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Mummy Sheep learns that she has got a new job far away, Peppa and Suzy wonder how they can stay best friends.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups are pretending to fly so mix up a Flying Adventure to learn how to really fly. But when Spin can't do it, will he find another way to join his friends in the sky.

programme.title: Milkshake! Monkey
programme.desc: Preschool series starring an inquisitive puppet. Milkshake Monkey's friends are playing ball games. Monkey is brilliant at kicking, but needs a little help with catching.

programme.title: Milo
programme.desc: Milo, Lofty and Lark take over as royal guards to transport and protect Queen Mabel's Crown Jewels. When Mr Croc plans to steal the jewels, Milo, Lofty and Lark must stand guard.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends All Engines Go!
programme.desc: Kana and Thomas deliver aquarium materials for the Vicarstown Fish Day, while Percy and Nia to deliver the fish themselves.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Sarah teaches Nipper how to do a high-five, and it's really great until he wanders away from her and starts an oven fire with his paw.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: Pip and Posy are playing a fun game where they can't touch the ground for fear that crocodiles will chomp them in Croc Attack. However, Pip starts to become obsessed with playing.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is at Suzy's house and there is a pile of cardboard boxes so they play with them. Peppa and her friends turn the boxes into a shop, a spaceship and even a hospital.

programme.title: Paw Patrol: Jet to the Rescue
programme.desc: The Princess of Blaffenburcht is having her birthday party. But if her birthday present ends up in the wrong hands, it causes a lot of problems.

programme.title: Animal Care Club
programme.desc: The cadets care for all kinds of pets, giving check-ups to a cuddly puppy and a chirpy budgie, listening to a corn snake's heartbeat, and finding out what's making a dog's ears itchy.

programme.title: The Creature Cases
programme.desc: When a naked mole rat princess goes missing, Sam and Kit are called in to find her. But the open desert is no place for a defenceless mole rat.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick loses the remote in the cushions, so he journeys into the couch to track it down.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Jules Hudson hosts the show that helps people find the hidden treasure in their home to sell at auction and make a dream come true.

programme.title: Happy Campers: The Caravan Park
programme.desc: It's high summer in Devonandtime for the guests at Crealy Theme Park & Resort to relax and let their hair down. But for the staff, there's no time to put their feet up.

programme.title: Happy Campers: The Caravan Park
programme.desc: For receptionist Denise, working the summer season means being constantly on the move, as she patrols the park to make sure incoming campers are pitched-up to perfection.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Cruise of a Lifetime
programme.desc: Susan explores the Caribbean by super yacht - including St Martin's Maho Beach and Anguilla's nature hike. Plus, she's served champagne by the captain from a surfboard.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Cruise of a Lifetime
programme.desc: Susan's cruise continues as she explores pristine islands, snorkels at Sandy Spit, discovers wildlife on Prickly Pear, and tries hi-tech sport e-foiling in St Barts.

programme.title: Mrs Caldicot's Cabbage War
programme.desc: Comedy starring Pauline Collins and Peter Capaldi. After her husband's death forces a widow in to a nursing home, she seeks her independence.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Mrs Caldicot's Cabbage War
programme.desc: Comedy starring Pauline Collins and Peter Capaldi. After her husband's death forces a widow in to a nursing home, she seeks her independence.

programme.title: Runaway Bride
programme.desc: Romantic comedy starring Julia Roberts and Richard Gere. A cynical reporter decides to write a story about a woman who has left three men at the altar.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Runaway Bride
programme.desc: Romantic comedy starring Julia Roberts and Richard Gere. A cynical reporter decides to write a story about a woman who has left three men at the altar.

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: Charlie Bigham: Britain's Britain's Poshest Ready Meal
programme.desc: There's a new breed of ultra-posh ready meals, and leading the charge is Charlie Bigham. We ask if a ready meal ever be worth such an inflated price tag.

programme.title: The Air Fryer Diet: Lose Weight Cook Fast
programme.desc: Cherry Healey taste-tests a week's worth of calorie-controlled meals that can all be made in an air fryer - from speedy breakfasts to ideas for lunch and hearty dinners.

programme.title: Rich Holiday, Poor Holiday
programme.desc: This week's episode shows how wildly contrasting two holidays can be in the same city - Lisbon - when you have two very different budgets from opposite ends of the wealth divide.

programme.title: Rich Wedding, Poor Wedding
programme.desc: Two couples from completely different financial worlds are thrown into the ultimate wedding experiment as they swap budgets - and with it, their expectations, dreams, and comfort zones.

programme.title: When Parties Go Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: A hilarious - occasionally jaw-dropping - celebration of gatherings gone awry, including party game gaffes, disco disasters, pole-dancing parents, and buffet brawls.

programme.title: The World's Most Luxurious Cruise
programme.desc: Cruising the Med, the crew are on tenterhooks as travel writer Adam Coulter is on board, sampling the spa, the food, and taking an excursion to a Spanish rum distillery.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Jules Hudson and expert appraiser David Fergus are in Derbyshire, treasure hunting with Anna and Steve.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Chris Kamara and expert appraiser Paul Hayes are in Yorkshire, treasure hunting with Gillian and her son Matthew.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The guys take a ride with a police officer. Rachel overhears a telephone message for Ross.

programme.title: **Visually Signed**The Highland Vet
programme.desc: Observational documentary series following vets in Thurso and Wick. A Tamaskan puppy has been attacked, and Guy's social plans are put on pause by a heifer. (VS).
